-  added the optional property `_embedded/workspaceGroup` to the response with the `200` status


### POST /api/workspaces
-  added the optional property `_embedded/workspaceGroup` to the response with the `200` status


### POST /api/workspaces/bulk
-  added the optional property `items/_embedded/workspaceGroup` to the response with the `200` status


### POST /api/workspaces/list
-  added the optional property `items/_embedded/workspaceGroup` to the response with the `200` status


### POST /api/workspaces/templates/{templateId}
-  added the optional property `_embedded/workspaceGroup` to the response with the `200` status


### PUT /api/workspaces/workspace-relations/set
-  added the optional property `_embedded/workspaceGroup` to the response with the `200` status


### GET /api/workspaces/{workspaceId}
-  added the optional property `_embedded/workspaceGroup` to the response with the `200` status


### PATCH /api/workspaces/{workspaceId}
-  added the optional property `_embedded/workspaceGroup` to the response with the `200` status
